name: Githzerai Character Concepts
summary: 1All energy must be expended to a useful end. Frivolity is the first step to defeat.
bonuses: 1All energy must be expended to a useful end. Frivolity is the first step to defeat.
2Patience in all things. The first step in any venture is the most treacherous.
3Emotions are a trap, meant to weaken the intellect and disturb the nerves. Pay them no heed.
4Begin only those tasks you will finish. Strike only that which you will kill.

traits.name: 2Patience in all things
traits.summary: The first step in any venture is the most treacherous.

traits.name: 4Begin only those tasks you will finish
traits.summary: Strike only that which you will kill.

traits.name: 1Faith
traits.summary: Zerthimon shall return, and I will be worthy to walk beside him.

traits.name: 2Courage
traits.summary: The mind can master anything if it is unfettered by fear.

traits.name: 3Duty
traits.summary: My people survive only because those like me place their needs above our own.

traits.name: 4Freedom
traits.summary: No strong soul should be enslaved. Better to die first than live as another's puppet.
